spec.name: A Dank Chamber
spec.description: This chamber has a dank, dusty, musty smell to it. Small footprints in the dust betray the recent passage of some sort of creatures. A hole in the floor lies to the west and a stairway is to the east.

east.description: You see a spiral stone stairway.

west.description: You see only blackness through the hole in the floor.
